coaching.headline: The template win: objectives 25–11, Fangtooth at 7, Prime and Orb both yours at 28–29, towers 7–4. Macro, start to finish.
coaching.team: This is what to repeat — you took the early Fangtooth, controlled the mid-game Prime/Orb, and translated it straight to towers. Xeebs on his jungle and Cuban on his carry anchored it. Anti-heal was light (1 vs one healer) but the snowball was fast enough it didn't matter. Bank this shape.
coaching.whatShiftedIt: Nothing to fix — this is your ceiling: early Fangtooth, mid-game Prime/Orb control, and a 25-11 objective lead converted straight to towers.

perPlayer.a412baf3-dd17-4f89-8ecf-9d0704f3a79e: Khaimera on your lane and favored into Grux — controlled neutrals and the objective timings. This is your jungle at its best.
perPlayer.a0c393cc-1437-4bdc-8168-64676ce2166c: Sparrow on your lane (11/6) — steady carry that the objective leads converted to a win.
perPlayer.16f28434-561f-4f23-9454-40321f4a1ef3: Wraith mid into an unfavored Gideon — held the lane (4/3/6) while the team won the macro game.
perPlayer.10edbf65-457d-48d0-9151-9df5b4fcb40a: Skylar offlane, 5/2, low-death and you called the Fangtooth/Prime — well-directed, even off your jungle seat.
perPlayer.7c8ab99c-31c5-4ea5-a6fa-e0d6417c3f1b: Riktor into a favored Zinx, 12 assists — good engage that helped control the objective timings in a 25-11 macro win.

threats: Chain-CC risk (2 hard-CC abilities, ~1.0s of lockdown): Grux Crush (knockup 0.5s), Iggy & Scorch Inferno (knockback). Don't group tight into it — stagger the engage and hold mobility/cleanse for the key one.
Heal-stacking: Zinx. Anti-heal is mandatory against this comp — you brought none.
synergy: Your engage/CC: Riktor Riplash (pull), Riktor Shock Therapy (silence 0.8s), Riktor Skewer (suppress 1.25s). Your kills come from landing burst INSIDE that CC window — whoever lands it, the rest must follow up immediately.
You have sustain (Riktor) — favor the longer fight where your heals out-grind them.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Riplash pull → Shock Therapy silence → Skewer suppress ult
ourKits.winCondition: pull a target in and chain silence+suppress for a guaranteed kill
ourKits.playWith: burst that deletes his pulled/suppressed target
ourKits.playAgainst: respect Riplash range — stay spaced; cleanse/QSS the suppress

ourKits.combo: Peekaboo! mark+slow → Knock, Knock! sniper → Back It Up! displacement ult
ourKits.winCondition: land long-range snipes on marked targets and reset on takedowns
ourKits.playWith: engage that holds a target in his sniper line
ourKits.playAgainst: close the gap — he's weak point-blank; dodge the skillshot snipe

ourKits.combo: Piercing Shot poke → Heightened Senses AS → Hail of Arrows zone → Inner Fire ult
ourKits.winCondition: ramp Relentless + AS and sustained-DPS the front down
ourKits.playWith: heavy peel — she's immobile and pure DPS
ourKits.playAgainst: she has zero escape — hard-engage her and she dies first

ourKits.combo: Plasma Grenade → Hypercharge on-hit → Air Assault reposition → Atomiser ult
ourKits.winCondition: Hypercharge and kite-shoot from Air Assault safety
ourKits.passive: extra jump; kills cause corpse explosions
ourKits.playWith: a frontline so she can free-fire airborne
ourKits.playAgainst: CC her out of Air Assault; she's squishy on the ground

ourKits.combo: Ambush leap → Unleash AS → Cull stun, Invigorate to cleanse+heal
ourKits.winCondition: stick on one target, stun with Cull and out-sustain via Spirit Regen
ourKits.playWith: follow-up burst inside his Cull stun
ourKits.playAgainst: ANTI-HEAL is mandatory — it guts his whole kit; kite the leap and CC through Invigorate

enemyKits.combo: Ricochet stun → Bad Medicine zone → Infuse heal an ally → Neural Regenesis revive
enemyKits.winCondition: keep an ally alive with Infuse + the revive ult and poke with Ricochet
enemyKits.playWith: a carry she can pocket-heal and revive
enemyKits.playAgainst: she can't heal herself — dive HER; bait the revive before committing

enemyKits.combo: Smash 'n Grab pull → Crush knockup → Warlord's Challenge stun → bleed-stacked basics
enemyKits.winCondition: land the pull→knockup chain to lock a target while bleed and AS shred them
enemyKits.passive: basics stack a bleed for sustained damage
enemyKits.playWith: follow-up burst inside his knockup/stun window
enemyKits.playAgainst: telegraphed engage — bait Crush/Pull, then punish; kite his slow start

enemyKits.combo: stance-swap with Zero Shift → Tachyon Lance (ranged) or melee chain → Limit Break on Overheat
enemyKits.winCondition: build Heat and burst with Limit Break, flexing range and melee
enemyKits.passive: damage builds Heat → Overheat unlocks Limit Break
enemyKits.playWith: peel that lets her ramp Heat safely
enemyKits.playAgainst: pressure her before Overheat; CC during the melee stance

enemyKits.combo: Void Breach slow → Cosmic Rift → Black Hole on the grouped enemies
enemyKits.winCondition: land Black Hole / Cosmic Rift on a clumped team for AoE burst
enemyKits.passive: an ability-empowered basic tethers a target for bonus damage
enemyKits.playWith: hard engage that clumps enemies into his Black Hole
enemyKits.playAgainst: immobile with long cooldowns — dodge the skillshots and dive him once Black Hole is down

enemyKits.combo: Oil Spill → Molotov ignite → Flame Turret → Inferno knockback ult
enemyKits.winCondition: layer fire zones on a choke/objective and burn the team
enemyKits.playWith: CC that holds enemies in his fire
enemyKits.playAgainst: don't fight in his zones — flank; kill the turret, dive him
